# Repository Settings — Copy to GitHub

## 📝 Short Description (for GitHub "About" section)
Use this in: Settings → About → Description

```
🤖 AI-powered investment management system with 5 intelligent engines (Recommendations, Risk Analyzer, Chatbot, Portfolio Analyzer, AI Reports) | Java JSP + MySQL + Tomcat 10 | Premium dark dashboard UI with Chart.js analytics
```

## 🏷️ Topics (Tags for GitHub)
Copy these and add to: Settings → About → Topics

```
java
jsp
mysql
tomcat
investment-management
ai
artificial-intelligence
portfolio-management
fintech
dashboard
chartjs
bootstrap
servlet
jakarta-ee
netbeans
xampp
finance
trading
analytics
dark-theme
```

## 🌐 Website URL (Optional)
If you have a demo deployed:
```
https://pugalmarxis.github.io/Ai-investment-management
```

## ✨ Repository Features to Enable
Go to Settings and enable:
- [x] Issues
- [x] Discussions
- [x] Wiki
- [x] Projects
- [x] Releases

## 📌 Pin This Repository
Go to your GitHub profile → Customize your pins → Pin this repo
